message:
Major CLI expansion with profile management, pattern testing, and batch modes

- main.rs: Add ~999 lines implementing profile subcommands (list, apply, save,
  delete), pattern testing mode with verbose match output, batch processing
  for multiple inputs, streaming output for large result sets, diagnostics
  and debug modes with structured logging
- patterns.rs: Simplify Option handling with or_default(), adjust pattern
  compilation path resolution
- rulesets.rs: Add manifest entry creation helpers and timestamp utilities
- config.rs: Minor cleanup and default adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
